---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Orpheus
title: ''
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. If applicable, include error messages or console output.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g. macOS 15.2 Sequoia)
- **Orpheus version:** (visible in Settings → About, e.g. 0.5.3)

## Logs and screenshots

If applicable, paste relevant log output or attach screenshots. Orpheus logs can
be found at:

```
~/Library/Logs/Orpheus/
```

Or open the Electron DevTools console (View → Toggle Developer Tools) and copy
any relevant errors.
